## Meeting Purpose

[Explore modern marketing strategies and GrowthX's content creation services for Terratrue's future growth plans.](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation workflows with human expertise, focusing on editorial (60-70%) and programmatic SEO (30-40%) content](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Terratrue is considering organic content strategies for Q3, moving away from paid agencies](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines proprietary tech with high-level marketing experts to deliver efficient, high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Topics

### Terratrue's Current Marketing Situation

  - [One predictable go-to-market motion: outbound sales (outsourced to agency)](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Exploring organic content strategies as next investment area](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Considering modern marketing approaches, especially with AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Targeting late Q3 for potential engagement with new content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)

### GrowthX's Service Overview

  - [Focus on building repeatable content engines using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Two main content types: editorial and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Editorial content (60-70% of engagements) for deeper understanding of voice, tone, and personas](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO (30-40% of engagements) for high-volume, templatized content](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Proprietary platform and workflows with human-in-the-loop steps](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [End-to-end ownership of content creation process, including images and staging](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [High-level expertise: Managing Directors, Managing Editors, and Content Managers with industry experience](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Efficient operations allowing for competitive pricing and margins](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [10+ workflows for a single piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Includes research, briefing, internal linking, meta tags, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Client involvement through feedback on outputs, not direct platform interaction](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Use of Notion and Slack for async communication and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Pricing Structure

  - [Editorial content: Starts at $9k/month for 50,000 words (about 8 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: Starts at $12k/month for 1200 pages/year](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Flat pricing structure, not adjusted based on company size](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kwan to follow up via email with additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Potential Slack channel setup for easier communication and sharing](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Revisit partnership opportunity in late Q3 when Terratrue is ready to move forward with new content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/AqcDAdqjjCovjFyaAGpY1DeSwHtDT7tA?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
